HGSS.249.0000:
OK!
You must be the last passenger.\f
HGSS.249.0001:
Huh?
Doesn’t seem like the ship will be moving\r
anytime soon.
HGSS.249.0002:
If I manage to come back safely from
this journey and take my first steps in\r
Olivine City, will you live there with me?\f
Please! I beg you!
HGSS.249.0003:
He’s only a crewman of a
pleasure cruise.\r
He has a way of exaggerating things.\f
HGSS.249.0004:
Sabrina: Out of the blue...
I get the urge to see the ocean...\f
It may be fun to exchange numbers
with you...\f
Do you want mine? [0200,0000]
HGSS.249.0006:
Sabrina: I think I can keep my promises
if you call me on Sundays around noon.
HGSS.249.0007:
Sabrina: I see...
I thought you’d make a good friend.
HGSS.249.0008:
Sabrina: Now you want to know
my number?\r
I can see it in your eyes... [0200,0000]
HGSS.249.0009:
Sabrina: It’s you...\f
How about a picture here
against the pleasant sea breeze? [0200,0000]
HGSS.249.0011: Sabrina: I think it looks good.
HGSS.249.0012:
Sabrina: I see...
I thought you’d make a good\r
picture subject...
HGSS.249.0013:
Your Photo Album is full.\f
Access your PC and delete
some pictures.
